scripts.setup:env: npm install && cd ../servers/fastapi && uv sync && cd ../nextjs && npm install && cd ../../electron && npm run setup:export-runtime
scripts.install:pyinstaller: cd ../servers/fastapi && echo 'pyinstaller will be installed via uv run --with when building'
scripts.build:vectorstore: echo 'Using prebuilt shared icons vectorstore index'
scripts.build:fastapi: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('resources/fastapi',{recursive:true,force:true})" && npm run build:vectorstore && cross-env MEM0_SPACY_STRICT=true node ensure_spacy_model.js && cd ../servers/fastapi && uv run --with pyinstaller python -m PyInstaller --distpath ../../electron/resources server.spec && cd ../../electron && node copy_fastapi_assets.js
scripts.build:electron: npm run generate:version && npm run build:export-runtime && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('app_dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc && node build.js
scripts.build:all: npm run clean:build && npm run setup:env && npm run build:ts && npm run install:pyinstaller && npm run build:nextjs && npm run build:fastapi && npm run build:electron
scripts.clean:build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['resources/nextjs','resources/fastapi','app_dist']) fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true})"
